hero.subtitle: Sell on Vinted <1>faster</1>, <2>clearer</2> and at the <3>right price</3>.
hero.description: Create optimized listings in minutes to boost your <1>statistical sales probability</1>.

problem.title: Your listing is selling less than it could

items.photos: Unoptimized photos → don't attract or convince
items.title: Bare title → nobody finds it
items.details: Missing key details → trust breaks down
items.price: Uncompetitive price → no clicks, no offers
items.value: No value conveyed → users scroll past

solution.subtitle: AI tools to create listings that sell, with the support of a dedicated coach.

studio.title: SAFEViN Studio
studio.body: Strategic listing construction through photo analysis on the 4 key conversion pillars, followed by targeted questions to improve final quality. Structured output with strategic pricing to drive offers and closing, plus extra sales tips.

artist.title: SAFEViN Artist Director
artist.body: Entrust the visual campaigns of your items to SAFEViN: every photo is analyzed to ensure visual consistency and quality, so your listing communicates professionalism and attracts more buyers.

coach.title: SAFEViN Coach
coach.body: Actively supports you with targeted questions to help you solve every problem and reach your sales goal. It guides you on photos, titles, descriptions and selling strategies.

pillars.subtitle: Every image is rated on 4 key parameters to maximize your selling probability.

qualita.label: Quality
qualita.body: We evaluate the sharpness and definition of every photo. Grainy or blurry images dramatically reduce buyer trust. For top scores shoot in natural light, with a stable camera and focus on the garment.

luce.label: Light
luce.body: We analyze how light hits the garment: backlight, harsh shadows or under-exposure hide important details. Frontal natural light (e.g. by a window) is always the best choice to show real color and detail.

contrasto.label: Contrast
contrasto.body: The garment must stand out from the background. Effective contrast makes the product readable and the protagonist of the image. Use a background opposite to the garment color (light for dark items, dark for light items).

completezza.label: Completeness
completezza.body: We check that the photo set covers all the necessary angles: front, back, details, labels and any defects. A complete set removes buyer doubts and speeds up the purchase decision.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three steps for listings that actually sell.

upload.title: Upload your photos
upload.description: Upload the product photos and the basic info and details will be extracted to speed up listing creation.

info.title: Add the key info
info.description: Only you know the essential details: answer a few questions for a hyper-specific, complete listing in minutes.

copy.title: Copy and publish
copy.description: Get title, description and strategic price ready to upload directly to Vinted and speed up the process.

disclaimer.label: Disclaimer
disclaimer.p1: SafeViN is an independent tool: we don't partner with Vinted.
disclaimer.p2: We don't guarantee certain results: outcomes also depend on product, price, demand and offer quality. SafeViN gives you tools and analysis, but final success is influenced by many market factors.

footer.note: SAFEViN is an independent listing analysis and optimization ecosystem. Not affiliated with Vinted. Results depend on the quality of the data provided and market conditions.
